title: P0: Fix /summon prompt/denylist conflict — enqueue blocked command response to player
description: The LLM system prompt instructs the bot to use /summon for combat, but /summon is in DeniedCommands. When blocked, the handler records pendingResponse to chatHistory but never enqueues it — the player receives silence. Fix: enqueue the LLM's response (or a fallback message) as a Chat action so the player sees feedback instead of silence. Sprint 57 Wave D fixed this.
